findings.message: postinstall script executes build pipeline (npm run build via spawnSync) on every npm install; supply chain risk if package is compromised
All production dependencies use ^ ranges allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh npm install without lockfile
spawnSync runs npm build during postinstall; build failure is soft-warned but install proceeds; no integrity check on build output
eval with variable TAIYI_CLI allows command injection via TAIYI_FORGE_ROOT env var or .taiyi/forge-root file; main execution path in run_taiyi()
eval with variable TAIYI_CLI inside npx fallback error handler — same command injection vector as line 71
npx fallback fetches oh-my-taiyiforge from npm without version pin; subject to package substitution or version hijack
Vague quantifier '显著' (significantly) in trigger criteria — no threshold defined for 运维负担差异
Missing output format section — CHANGE.md template not defined with path and required sections
Refers to docs/taiyi/token-budget.yaml and docs/taiyi/token-compress-hooks.yaml for configuration; file existence not verified
Missing output format section — DESIGN.md format, path, and required sections not formally defined
Missing output format section — dev output artifacts (.dev-complete, SUMMARY) have no defined path or format
Vague qualifier '高质量' used without inline criteria — Visual Review checklist referenced but not specified
Unclosed Markdown code block in step 3 — steps 4+ are visually absorbed into the bash block in standard Markdown renderers
Link to ../../docs/diagrams/pipeline.md — file existence not verified; skill declares this as authoritative source for export path conventions
Missing output format section — engine/dispatch skill has no defined document output
Refers to docs/taiyi/canonical-commands.md and docs/taiyi/commands.yaml as authoritative command sources; file existence not verified
Missing output format section — health巡检 result path and format not defined
Missing output format section — CHANGELOG.md format and path not specified with template
Vague quantifier '相关' (relevant) used without criteria — 何时使用 table gives some signal but 相关 in prose is unquantified
Missing output format section — REQUIREMENT.md format, path, and required sections not specified
Missing output format section — REVIEW.md structure and path not defined
Missing output format section — TEST.md output path and structure not defined
Missing output format section — no persistent output format defined for ultrawork orchestration result
Missing output format section — TEST.md output path and structure not defined — No ## 输出 section present; file has only 步骤0, 第1轮, 第2-5轮, 禁止 — no output path or TEST.md template
Missing output format section — health巡检 result path and format not defined — No ## 输出 section present; health scan produces no named persistent artifact with defined path
Missing output format section — REQUIREMENT.md format, path, and required sections not specified — No ## 输出 section present; REQUIREMENT.md structure not specified beyond four numbered steps

Missing output format section — dev output artifacts (.dev-complete, SUMMARY) have no defined path or format — No ## 输出 section present; output artifacts .dev-complete and SUMMARY mentioned inline but without path or format definition

Missing output format section — no persistent output format defined for ultrawork orchestration result — No ## 输出 section present; orchestration result is described only as merge + ralph + continue with no artifact format
Missing output format section — REVIEW.md structure and path not defined — No ## 输出 section present; REVIEW.md structure not specified; 产出修复任务T-FIX-XX mentioned inline only
Missing output format section — CHANGELOG.md format and path not specified with template — No ## 输出 section present; CHANGELOG format described only as Added/Changed/Fixed keywords in a bullet point
Missing output format section — DESIGN.md format, path, and required sections not formally defined — No ## 输出 section present; DESIGN.md format described only through step headings (0, 1, 2, 3, 9)
Missing output format section — engine/dispatch skill has no defined document output — No ## 输出 section present; skill dispatches to taiyi CLI and produces no persistent document artifact

Missing output format section — CHANGE.md template not defined with path and required sections — No ## 输出 section present; CHANGE.md sections (Motivation, Scope, Success Criteria, 影响面) described in step bodies but no path or template block
Vague quantifier '相关' (relevant) used without criteria — 何时使用 table gives some signal but 相关 in prose is unquantified — Found "与本变更相关的代码现实" in 目的 section — 相关 (relevant) has no quantitative boundary
Vague quantifier '显著' (significantly) in trigger criteria — no threshold defined for 运维负担差异 — Found "运维负担显著不同" in 何时使用 table — 显著 (significantly) has no numeric or categorical threshold

Vague qualifier '高质量' used without inline criteria — Visual Review checklist referenced but not specified — Found "高质量 / 视觉审查" in step 5 — 高质量 (high quality) has no definition; Visual Review checklist referenced but not inline

Unclosed Markdown code block in step 3 — steps 4+ are visually absorbed into the bash block in standard Markdown renderers — Opening ```bash at line 58 has no closing ``` before line 62 where step 4 text begins; step 4 and beyond are rendered inside the code block

eval with variable TAIYI_CLI allows command injection via TAIYI_FORGE_ROOT env var or .taiyi/forge-root file; main execution path in run_taiyi() — eval "$TAIYI_CLI" "$@" — TAIYI_CLI is set from TAIYI_FORGE_ROOT env var (line 8) and .taiyi/forge-root file (lines 13-17) without sanitization; attacker controlling either can inject arbitrary shell commands

eval with variable TAIYI_CLI inside npx fallback error handler — same command injection vector as line 71 — _out=$(eval "$TAIYI_CLI" "$@" 2>"$_err") — same eval-with-variable pattern inside npx fallback branch (lines 49-69)

postinstall script executes build pipeline (npm run build via spawnSync) on every npm install; supply chain risk if package is compromised — "postinstall": "node postinstall.mjs" found in scripts section; runs automatically on npm install without user confirmation

npx fallback fetches oh-my-taiyiforge from npm without version pin; subject to package substitution or version hijack — echo "npx -p oh-my-taiyiforge taiyi" — unpinned package name fetched from npm registry at runtime as CLI fallback

spawnSync runs npm build during postinstall; build failure is soft-warned but install proceeds; no integrity check on build output — spawnSync("npm", ["run", "build"], { cwd: pkgRoot, stdio: "inherit" }) — runs npm build during npm install

All production dependencies use ^ ranges allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades on fresh npm install without lockfile — 9 production deps use ^ ranges: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk ^1.29.0, handlebars ^4.7.9, proper-lockfile ^4.1.2, remark ^15.0.1, remark-gfm ^4.0.1, remark-parse ^11.0.0, unified ^11.0.5, zod ^4.4.3, zod-to-json-schema ^3.25.2
Link to ../../docs/diagrams/pipeline.md — file existence not verified; skill declares this as authoritative source for export path conventions
Refers to docs/taiyi/canonical-commands.md and docs/taiyi/commands.yaml as authoritative command sources; file existence not verified
Refers to docs/taiyi/token-budget.yaml and docs/taiyi/token-compress-hooks.yaml for configuration; file existence not verified
